core_principles: Authority and Clarity: Dense, structured grids replacing generic floating cards.
Functional Beauty: 1px visible borders over soft shadows to define layout.
Creative Restraint: Brand yellow/lime used explicitly for interaction states and key data highlights, never as a large decorative background.
Data as Hero: Tables and lists take precedence with strong typographic hierarchy.
anti_patterns: No Inter, Roboto, or generic sans-serif fonts for headings.
No purple/blue gradients or generic SaaS aesthetic.
No soft, muddy drop shadows. Use crisp 1px borders or hard shadows if necessary.
No fully transparent backgrounds behind text elements.

scale.h1: text-4xl tracking-tight leading-none sm:text-5xl font-black text-stone-950
scale.h2: text-2xl tracking-tight leading-none sm:text-3xl font-bold text-stone-900
scale.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-stone-500

typography.guidelines: Do not default to generic weights. Use extreme contrast (Black for main titles, Medium for body). Tables should have extremely legible, tabular numerical data formatting where applicable.

layout.spacing_scale: Generous on container padding (p-6, p-8) and tight on data correlation (gap-2, gap-4).
layout.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid. Dense, strict. Use border-collapse patterns or 1px grid borders instead of isolated cards.

components.cards: Flat, rounded-sm, bg-white, 1px solid border-stone-200, no drop shadows.
components.tables: Full width, visible dividing lines (border-b border-stone-200), generous row height, left-aligned standard, right-aligned metrics. Hover state on rows: bg-stone-50.
components.sidebar: Fixed width (260px), flush right border (border-r border-stone-200). Active links get a subtle bg-white and a left border highlight of #D4FF00.
components.topbar: Sticky, glassmorphism or solid white with bottom border (border-b border-stone-200). Height h-16. Minimalist user profile.
components.buttons: Sharp corners (rounded-sm). Primary: bg-[#D4FF00] text-stone-950 hover:bg-[#BDE600] font-bold. Secondary: bg-white border border-stone-200 text-stone-900 hover:bg-stone-50.
components.inputs: Flat, sharp borders, bg-stone-50, focus states use dark borders (border-stone-950) instead of default blue rings.

motion.hover: Instant background shifts, crisp technical feel.

images.description: Group of seniors painting at a table - represents the core mission of Creative Mojo (Creative arts in care homes). Use with a dark or stone overlay to ensure login box readability.

testing.guidelines: Every interactive element MUST include a specific kebab-case data-testid (e.g., login-submit-button, franchisee-row-[id], sidebar-nav-contacts). This is critical.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard using pure Tailwind for layouts to achieve the 'Grid Borders' sharp UI feel. Do not over-rely on pre-baked Shadcn cards if they force overly rounded corners and shadows.
Implement a standard Layout with Sidebar (left) and Topbar (top right).
Ensure all fonts (Cabinet Grotesk, Manrope) are loaded properly via CDN or local assets.
Login page should be a split screen layout: left side image (the senior painting class) with a subtle dark/stone overlay, right side clean minimalist login form.
The Airtable inspector page should read like a dense developer/database view (minimal styling, maximum data density).

Franchisee Detail pages should clearly mirror their original structure (photo, contact details, address, status pills, linked contracts list) but elevated with the new E1 typography and 1px geometric grid styling.
